text:
is the third collection of short stories for the Attack on Titan manga, written by Hajime Isayama. The booklet was bundled with the special edition of volume 29.

The English edition was exclusively released as two compilation volumes including stories from volume 4 and volume 5 in the final season part 1 manga box set released by Kodansha USA in December 2021 and final season part 2 manga box set released by Kodansha USA in November 2022.

The stories were originally published on the "au Smart Pass" and "Sugotoku" apps.

Plot

WHAT MAKES US FIGHT ON?

What drives the many soldiers and civilians within the Walls? Whether it's justice, desire, or duty, there's something inside everyone that moves them to action. The short stories in this collection focusing on written words, brief scenes, and foundational moments provide a glimpse into what makes the complex characters of Attack on Titan's world tick. Spanning from Eren Yeager to Minister Nick, each of these vignettes will give any fan of the series an even deeper understanding of its cast.
